criteria.name: Functionality
criteria.description: The range of features and capabilities offered by the app, such as music generation, editing tools, and customization options.
criteria.sources: Product descriptions, user reviews, official websites

criteria.name: User Experience
criteria.description: The ease of use, interface design, and overall user satisfaction with the app.
criteria.sources: User reviews, app ratings, usability studies

criteria.name: Innovation
criteria.description: The uniqueness and advancement of the app's AI technology in music creation.
criteria.sources: Industry analyses, expert reviews, technological assessments

criteria.name: Popularity
criteria.description: The app's user base size, download numbers, and market presence.
criteria.sources: App store statistics, market research reports

criteria.name: Cost
criteria.description: The pricing model of the app, including free versions, subscriptions, or one-time purchases.
criteria.sources: Official pricing information, app store listings
